svg.title: CommunityPulse AI — Solution Architecture Overview
svg.desc: End-to-end architecture showing data ingestion, AI processing, smart matching, and volunteer dispatch for the Solution Challenge 2026

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the data ingestion layer in CommunityPulse AI')
sendPrompt('How does field report ingestion work?')
sendPrompt('What third party data sources are supported?')
sendPrompt('Explain the Gemini AI processing pipeline in detail')
g.text: OCR extraction · NLP structuring · Sentiment · Priority scoring · Entity tagging

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the Unified Community Need Map and how does it work?')
sendPrompt('How does the Volunteer Registry work?')
sendPrompt('How does the AI Matching Engine work algorithmically?')
sendPrompt('What does the NGO dashboard show?')
sendPrompt('How does volunteer dispatch and notification work?')
sendPrompt('How does the impact tracker work?')
sendPrompt('What does the public need heatmap show?')
sendPrompt('How does the admin control panel work?')
